Contact Us Dr. Sudhir Srivastava DR. NANDITA SUDHIR DR. DEVSHREE CHANDORKAR DR. ASHUTOSH RASTOGI DR. NEHA AGARWAL DR. SAURABH GANGWAR Dr. KOMAL SINGH DR. ALOK SINGH DR. RIYA CHOPRA DR. GAURANG SEHGAL DR. UTKARSH RAI ABOUT SUN EYE The Sun Eye Hospital & Laser Center is one of the leading super specialty eye care center. It is headed by medical director Dr. Sudhir Srivastava, a renowned ophthalmic surgeon who has many national and International experiences in his credit. Sun Eye Hospital, since its inception in 2000 has always strived to offer the very best of the ophthalmic patients has been in the forefront of delivering specialized eye care services for various disorders of the eye. We are committed to the protection and preservation of the treasured gift of sight. Consistent with our mission to resolve diseases. Read more.. ABOUT SUN EYE CHIEF SURGEON CHIEF SURGEON Dr. Sudhir Srivastava is an eye surgeon specialised in modern cataract surgery, refractive surgery and keratoconus management.
        He did his MBBS and MS from King George Medical College Lucknow and completed Mch. from University of Seychelles. 
        He is an internationally recognized Cataract and Refractive Surgeon with hands on experience of more than 85,000 cataract surgeries and more than 11,000 refractive surgeries. 
        He is regarded as a Coach and mentor for knowledge sharing, educating and training the young ophthalmologists.  
        Dr Sudhir Srivastava has made more than 10 publications and had been faculty at various National and International conferences which includes: European Society of Cataract and Refractive Services American Society of Cataract and Refractive Services Asia-Pacific Association of Cataract and Refractive Services World Ophthalmology Conference At present he is working as chief Eye Surgeon and Managing Director at Sun Eye Hospital, Lucknow, India. He can be reached through email – sudhireye@gmail.com Read more.. TECHNOLOGY AND ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE At Sun Eye Hospitals, we leverage the latest advancements in eye care technology to deliver exceptional patient care. Our hospitals are equipped with state-of-the-art diagnostic and surgical tools and machines, ensuring accurate diagnoses and effective treatments. From advanced imaging techniques like Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT), digital fundoscopy, pentacam, iTracy to precision surgical equipment like Lumera 700, Centurion, Constellation and excimer lasers. Our hospital makes efficient use of Artificial intelligence in cataract and refractive surgeries. We offer a comprehensive range of solutions for eye health needs.
          Our commitment to innovation ensures that you receive the highest standard of care, helping you achieve optimal vision and good eye health. Read more.. TECHNOLOGY AND ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE OUR EXPERTISE Cataract Cataract is the clouding of the natural crystalline lens and typically occurs because of ageing, although other reasons Learn more Glaucoma Glaucoma results from damage to the optic nerve. Usually the damage is from increased pressure in the eye. Learn more Oculoplasty Oculoplastic surgery is the cosmetic, corrective, and reconstructive surgery of the eye. . Learn more Cornea The Cornea departments in SunEye Hospital network offer cutting edge technologies at affordable cost to the patients. Learn more Refractive Error Refractive errors are eye disorders and not diseases. These include myopia, hyperopia and astigmatism. Learn more Vitreoretina The Vitreoretina service at SunEye Hospital is a major referral center which deals with the management of diabetic Learn more Pediatric ( Child eye care ) At SunEye Hospitals we provide treatment for an extensive range of pediatric eye problems such as Learn more Dry Eye Disease Dry eye is the most common disease among today’s population and most mismanaged eye condition Learn more LEARNING AND AWARENESS LATEST ON @SunEyeCafe Frequently Asked Questions(FAQs) Q. Is same day appointment possible with Sun Eye Hospitals ? A. Yes, For all Doctors and all specialities on first come, first serve basis. Q. What is the phone number for appointments and follow ups? A. +91-72 330 12345 is one point of contact for all services of SunEye Hospitals. Q. How many specialities treatment available at Sun Eye Hospitals? A. All eye care specialities treatment with dedicated surgeons e.g Cornea, Retina, Cataract, Refractive, Oculoplasty, Child eye, Glaucoma etc. Q.  What all TPA’s accepted at Sun Eye Hospitals for cashless treatment? A. We accept all TPA;s for cashless treatment. Q. Does Sun Eye provide treatment under Ayushman Bharat Yojna? A. Yes, We accept and treat all Ayushman Bharat beneficiaries. Q. Is Advance Artificial Intelligenec cataract surgery available at Sun Eye? A. Yes, Our both hospitals are equipped with Artificial Intelligence technology for cataract and refractive surgeries. Q.  What refractive technologies available at Sun Eye? A. We have biggest refractive centres with all modern specs removal technologies. Q. Does Sun Eye offer tele-consultation? A. No, We do not provide any type of consultation through tele/video call. WHAT OUR PATIENTS SAY Prev Next SunEye group of hospitals!
                Best eye hospitals of Uttar Pradesh with global standard infrastructure and State-of-the-art eye care facilities.
